faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Brow Tint
faq.description: Got questions about our AI brow tint generator? Here are answers to the most common questions about brow tinting previews.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team

items.question: What is Brow Tint and how does the AI brow tint generator work?
items.answer: Brow Tint is a free online AI-powered brow tinting tool built on GPT Image 2. Simply upload your photo, choose a brow tint style — such as tinted brow gel, brow lamination and tint, or professional brow tint — and our AI generates a photorealistic preview of how you'll look with your new brow tint in seconds.

items.question: How realistic are the brow tint before and after results?
items.answer: Our GPT Image 2 AI produces highly realistic brow tint before and after images. The AI analyzes your face shape, skin tone, natural brow structure, and hair color to deliver accurate brow tinting previews that closely match real salon results.

items.question: Can I preview lash and brow tint styles together?
items.answer: Yes! Brow Tint supports combined lash and brow tint previews so you can see your full eye-framing look in one image. This is especially helpful if you're considering both lash tinting and brow tinting at your next salon visit.

items.question: What brow tint styles can I try with Brow Tint?
items.answer: You can preview a wide range of brow tinting styles including tinted brow gel in multiple shades, brow lamination and tint combinations, professional brow tint treatments, brow code tint formulas, lash and brow tint packages, and many more custom looks tailored to your preferences.

items.question: Is Brow Tint really free to use?
items.answer: Yes, Brow Tint offers a free plan that lets you use the AI brow tint generator with basic brow tinting previews at no cost. Our premium plan unlocks additional features including high-resolution downloads, more brow tint styles, and priority AI processing.

items.question: Is my photo data secure when using Brow Tint?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your photos are processed securely with encryption and are never shared with third parties. All uploaded images are automatically deleted after your brow tint preview is generated. We take your privacy seriously.

items.question: What is the difference between brow tint and tinted brow gel?
items.answer: Brow tint is a semi-permanent dye applied to the brow hairs and sometimes the skin for a fuller, defined look lasting 4–6 weeks. Tinted brow gel is a daily cosmetic product that adds color and hold, similar to mascara for eyebrows. With Brow Tint, you can preview both brow tint and tinted brow gel options before deciding.

items.question: Can I use Brow Tint to preview brow lamination and tint?
items.answer: Yes! Brow lamination and tint is one of our most popular preview styles. Our AI simulates the brushed-up, fuller look of brow lamination combined with tinting so you can see exactly how this trending treatment would look on you before booking an appointment.

items.question: How do I find the best brow tint shade for my skin tone?
items.answer: Brow Tint's AI analyzes your skin tone, natural hair color, and face shape to suggest the best brow tint shades for you. You can also manually browse different professional brow tint shades and tinted brow gel colors, generating unlimited previews until you find your perfect match.
